negators.markdownDescription:
List of patterns that mark a log line as boilerplate/continuation so message-template skips its own pattern compute.

Applies only when the template is single-event AND not a group head. Non-negator lines in that case still receive a pattern; negator-matching orphans do not.

contexts.markdownDescription:
Types of symbols to search

Specifies a comma delimited list of [symbol contexts](https://doc.log10x.com/run/transform/symbol/#contexts) values. This is argument is passed as the `symbolContexts` argument value for the [symbolSequence](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXObject+symbolSequence) function. (Default: log,exec)

maxLen.markdownDescription:
Max number of output chars

Specifies the max number of chars of the [symbolMessageField](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/message/#symbolmessagefield). Set 0 to unlimited. (Accepts number or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: 0)

messageField.markdownDescription:
Field name to assign with symbol sequence value

Specifies the name of the field to assign the return value of [symbolSequence](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXObject+symbolSequence) function when invoking it with the a symbolContext argument value of [symbolContexts](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/message/#symbolcontexts).  For an example, see [symbolInputField](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/message/#symbolinputfield). (Default: symbolMessage)

messageHashField.markdownDescription:
Field name to assign with the hash of the symbol sequence value

Specifies the name of the field to assign a compact, alphanumeric hash of the [symbolMessageField](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/message/#symbolmessagefield) value, computed via [TenXString.hash](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXString.hash).  The hash is a stable, JSON-safe identifier suitable for use as a deduplication key, metric dimension, or compact reference to the underlying message pattern.  Set to an empty value to disable. (Default: )

originField.markdownDescription:
Field name to assign with symbol message origin file

Specifies the name of the field to assign the return value of [symbolOrigin](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXObject+symbolOrigin) function. (Default: )
